infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GoShed uses your camera to photograph items so we can suggest what to do with them, like donate, sell, or gift.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GoShed can use photos you pick from your library to identify items and suggest next steps.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GoShed uses your general area to suggest nearby donation drop-offs and pickup options when you choose Donate.

plugins.cameraPermission: GoShed uses your camera to photograph items so we can suggest what to do with them, like donate, sell, or gift.
